task_completion.description: Screaming Frog SEO Spider is open and has crawled the target URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window is visible, with 'https://crawler-test.com/' entered in the top URL bar and crawl results or progress displayed.

task_completion.description: The 'Redirect Loop' filter is applied to identify infinite redirect loops.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Screaming Frog, the 'Response Codes' tab is selected, and the filter dropdown is set to 'Redirect Loop', showing the looping URLs.

task_completion.description: The list of redirect loops is exported to the expected CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog from Screaming Frog saving to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/redirect_loops.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in that directory.

task_completion.description: The text report loop_analysis.txt is created in the expected directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file 'loop_analysis.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: The text report contains the total number of loops and an example looping URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'loop_analysis.txt' are visible and include a number representing the total loops found and at least one specific URL from crawler-test.com that is looping.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The CSV file was exported using Screaming Frog's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Export' button being clicked in Screaming Frog or the application's native save dialog, rather than the file being created manually via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI tool by using curl, python, or other terminal scripts to find loops.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show scripts or commands (like curl or python) being used to fetch URLs and detect redirect loops.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Expected CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/redirect_loops.csv. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/loop_analysis.txt. Screaming Frog SEO Spider has a 'Redirect Loop' filter in its Response Codes tab that identifies URLs in circular redirect chains.
